query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `22_lead_score_history` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `leadId` INT NOT NULL,
  `leadName` VARCHAR(255),
  `score` INT NOT NULL,
  `tier` VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL,
  `temperature` VARCHAR(20),
  `serviceType` VARCHAR(30),
  `breakdownValor` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownTemperatura` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownEngajamento` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownVeiculo` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownServico` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownRecencia` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `breakdownCompletude` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `scoredAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_history_leadId (`leadId`),
  INDEX idx_history_scoredAt (`scoredAt`)
);
